content.hint: 提出折中方案时常用的具体比例表达
content.template: I get your point, but print still works well with our older customers—what if we reduce it by ___ instead?
content.knowledgePoint: 具体比例表达（用于折中方案）

content.hint: 先认可对方观点，再提出替代方案

blanks.answer: what if we optimize the targeting instead
options: what if we optimize the targeting instead
we should just stop all digital ads
why don't you just do it yourself

content.situation: 团队在讨论市场推广预算时，一位成员主张减少线上广告投入以节省成本，另一位成员担心这会影响年轻用户的转化率。
content.speakerText: I think we should cut the digital ad spend—it's too expensive and the ROI is low.
content.speakerTextCn: 我觉得该削减数字广告投入，太贵了，投资回报率太低。
content.knowledgePoint: 表达折中建议的礼貌回应结构
content.responseTemplate: I see what you mean, but younger customers mainly find us online—___?
